title: Clinical Fellow
description:
Description


Set the standard for healthcare with the National University Health System, a world-class academic health system comprising the Alexandra Hospital, National University Hospital, Ng Teng Fong General Hospital, National University Polyclinics, National University Cancer Institute, Singapore, National University Heart Centre, Singapore, National University Centre for Oral Health, Singapore and Asia’s leading medical schools, the NUS Yong Loo Lin School of Medicine, the NUS Saw Swee Hock School of Public Health and the NUS Faculty of Dentistry, NUHS is perfectly placed to help you transform the patient experience and your career.


The Departments are seeking candidates to join our fellowship programmes as Clinical Fellows.


As a Clinical Fellow, you will undergo the approved training programme by the Singapore Medical Council.


Job Requirements

  • Active in clinical practice for 3 years preceding the application of medical registration with Singapore Medical Council;
  • Possess basic medical degrees from an accredited medical university or its medical school, preferably with a postgraduate diploma or medical degree;
  • Possess a 12-month of completed housemanship/internship postings;
  • Possess a 3-year post housemanship/internship clinical experiences;
  • Fulfil the English Proficiency requirements of Singapore Medical Council, if basic degree is not in English medium;
  • Must be registered with the Medical Council or its relevant licensing authority from the country of practice;
  • Must be sponsored by the government, or regional health authority or an appropriate institution (with a full-time employment of 40 hours or more per week) of the home country;
  • Must be certified to be of a good standing by the Medical Council or its relevant licensing authority;
  • Must be successfully registered with the Singapore Medical Council;
  • Must be eligible for the relevant pass and Visa from the Ministry of Manpower, Singapore.

Qualifications

  • MBBS or equivalent basic medical degree and/or
  • Postgraduate qualifications relevant to the department’s specialty or nature of clinical training

postedCompany.description:
The National University Health System (NUHS) plays a key, contributing role in Singapore’s healthcare. Our versatile and experienced team of healthcare professionals has only one aim - to help people get better, and live healthier and longer lives.

We do this by improving medical care, lowering disease recurrence, producing better healthcare professionals, and turning research findings into better medical treatments for diseases that affect Singaporeans. And the reason we’re able to do these things is because we have the best and most dedicated people. Come join us and help shape medicine for our future.
postedCompany.name: NATIONAL UNIVERSITY HEALTH SYSTEM PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D05 Clementi New Town, Hong Leong Garden, Pasir Panjang
